expectations.evidence: Step 2 details worktree creation with 'git worktree add -b auth-feature .claude/worktrees/auth-feature 0.1.0', stale worktree check, and later removal with 'git worktree remove --force'. Step 5 verifies no stale worktrees remain.

Step 3 executes Phase 1 (Backend auth scaffolding), Phase 2 (Frontend auth UI), Phase 3 (Documentation update) sequentially, each with agent dispatch and post-phase verification (branch check, status check, log verify).
Step 4 shows 'git worktree remove --force', 'git merge auth-feature --no-ff', and 'git branch -d auth-feature'. Step 5 verifies worktree gone, HEAD on 0.1.0, and branch deleted.

eval_feedback.overall: With-skill run produced a comprehensive simulation of the full planner-lite workflow for the auth-feature plan. All 5 steps documented with tool call counts. The skill clearly guided the agent to follow the correct worktree isolation pattern despite the plan file not existing.
